## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and website localization plans.](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance: 360 articles published, 2.2k clicks in 8 days of April, aiming for 7-8k clicks by month-end](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Content strategy shift: Focus on video content, content syndication, and leveraging ecosystem for sourcing content](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Website localization: Plans to add French, German, and Spanish versions of the site, with careful consideration for SEO implications](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [14 new articles published, bringing total to 360](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [April (8 days): 2.2k clicks, 400k impressions](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Projecting 7-8k clicks for full month](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [10% growth in impressions, partly due to Easter-related content](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [1,600 total clicks from growth-related content](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Shifting focus from live streaming to video showroom content](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Exploring topics on immersive shopping experiences via video](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Emphasis on content syndication for retailers and brands](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Investigating competitors (e.g., Cindigo, Bazaarvoice) for content strategy insights](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Planning summer-focused content for brands and retailers](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Lead Generation and Tracking

  - [Currently tracking form downloads; working to include SQL data](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Discussing need for broader lead tracking, including total website leads](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Challenges in isolating SEO impact due to various marketing campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Form fills primarily from ebook downloads, but also include demo bookings](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

### Website Localization Plans

  - [Adding French, German, and Spanish versions of the website](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Using Webflow's localization feature for translation](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Concerns about AI translation accuracy and need for human verification](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Suggestion to create a spreadsheet of common phrases for accurate translation](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [SEO considerations for proper tagging and site structure with multiple languages](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Plan to analyze Cindigo's content strategy and performance](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Investigating Bazaarvoice's approach to user-generated content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to research content syndication topics and create articles](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Sam to share internal document on content challenges and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Ritesh to update HubSpot report to include SQL data (expected next week)](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Prateek to analyze Cindigo and Bazaarvoice content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Cameron to provide scope document for website localization project](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Prateek to review localization plans and provide SEO recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/vUJ5-BkedvrLycq1S84dnCkhiay_avNJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
